mapper.select:
/*RskMgmtMapper.selectRskMgmtListExcel*/ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUST_NM , A.SSN , A.BIRTH_DT , A.GENDER , A.BAN , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.SUB_STATUS_NM , A.SERVICE_TYPE , A.SERVICE_TYPE_NM , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , A.ON_OFF_TYPE_NM , A.OPEN_DT , A.TMNT_DT , A.TMNT_RSN_NM , A.REQ_DT , A.AGNCY_CD , A.AGNCY_NM , A.SHOP_USM_ID , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , A.PLCY_SALE_NM , A.AGRM_TRM , A.INST_MNTH_CNT , A.FST_PRDT_CODE , A.FST_INTM_SRL_NO , A.LST_PRDT_CODE , A.LST_INTM_SRL_NO , A.FST_DVC_CHG_DT , A.LST_DVC_CHG_DT , A.FST_RATE_CD , A.FST_RATE_NM , A.LST_RATE_CD , A.LST_RATE_NM , A.CHG_RATE_DT , A.RATE_USG_CNT , A.FST_SUS_DT , A.FST_MCN_DT , A.USG_DT_CNT , A.STOP_DT_CNT FROM ( SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , SUB.USER_SSN AS SSN , CASE WHEN REQ.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' OR REQ.CSTMR_TYPE = 'PP' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 0, 6) END BIRTH_DT , CASE WHEN REQ.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' OR REQ.CSTMR_TYPE = 'PP' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) END GENDER , SUB.BAN , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB.SUB_STATUS , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0003' AND CD_VAL = SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , SUB.PPPO AS SERVICE_TYPE , DECODE(SUB.PPPO, 'PO', '후불', '선불') AS SERVICE_TYPE_NM , SUB.ON_OFF_TYPE , DECODE(SUB.ON_OFF_TYPE, '1', '오프라인', '2', '홈쇼핑', '온라인') AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM , SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(SUB.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = 0 THEN '당일개통취소' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 90 THEN '90일이내해지' ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS TMNT_RSN_NM , SUBSTR(REQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 1,8) AS REQ_DT , SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS AGNCY_CD , SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE AS SUB_STATUS_DATE , SUB.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS AGNCY_NM , REQ.SHOP_USM_ID , REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE , DECODE(REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', '단말구매', '유심단독구매') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , REQ.SALE_PLCY_NM AS PLCY_SALE_NM , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 26, 3)) AS AGRM_TRM , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 23, 3)) AS INST_MNTH_CNT , NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 21 , 30)), REQ.REQ_USIM_NAME) AS FST_PRDT_CODE , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 51 , 30)) AS FST_INTM_SRL_NO , SUB.MODEL_NAME AS LST_PRDT_CODE , SUB.INTM_SRL_NO AS LST_INTM_SRL_NO , (SELECT SUBSTR(MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT), 1,8) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND INTM_SRL_NO <> NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 51 , 30)), SUB.ICC_ID) AND MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' AND EVNT_CD <> 'NAC') AS FST_DVC_CHG_DT , (SELECT SUBSTR(MAX(EVNT_TRTM_DT), 1,8) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND INTM_SRL_NO <> NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 51 , 30)), SUB.ICC_ID) AND MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' ) AS LST_DVC_CHG_DT , REQ.FST_RATE_CD , REQ.FST_RATE_NM , REQ.LST_RATE_CD , REQ.LST_RATE_NM , (SELECT SUBSTR(MIN(EFFECTIVE_DATE), 1,8) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SOC <> REQ.FST_RATE_CD) AS CHG_RATE_DT , DECODE((SELECT TO_DATE(SUBSTR(MAX(EFFECTIVE_DATE), 1,8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SOC <> REQ.FST_RATE_CD),0,99,(SELECT TO_DATE(SUBSTR(MAX(EFFECTIVE_DATE), 1,8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SOC <> REQ.FST_RATE_CD)) AS RATE_USG_CNT , (SELECT SUBSTR(MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT), 1,8) FROM MSP_JUO_STOP_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM ) AS FST_SUS_DT , (SELECT SUBSTR(MIN(EVNT_TRTM_DT), 1, 8) AS FST_MCN_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ( 'MCN', 'UPD', 'UPS' ) AND CONTRACT_NUM <> SVC_CNTR_NO GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM) AS FST_MCN_DT , TRUNC(DECODE(SUB.SUB_STATUS, 'C', TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), SYSDATE) - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS USG_DT_CNT , NVL((SELECT SUM(NVL(EVNT_STOP_DAY, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(EVNT_TRTM_DT,1,8), 'YYYYMMDD'))) FROM MSP_JUO_STOP_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM),0) AS STOP_DT_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ WHERE 1=1 AND SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt} AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM
AND SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD = #{orgnId}
) A WHERE 1=1
AND SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= 90
AND TO_DATE(A.FST_SUS_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= 90
AND TO_DATE(A.FST_DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= 90
AND TO_DATE(A.FST_MCN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') <= 90
AND RATE_USG_CNT <= 90
AND ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt} AND CUSTOMER_ID = A.CUSTOMER_ID ) > 1
AND ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt} AND BAN = A.BAN ) > 1
AND (A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} OR A.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchVal}))
AND A.CUST_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVal} || '%'
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchVal}
ORDER BY A.CUST_NM
